services.name: Interior Car Detailing
services.shortDescription: A focused interior reset for daily drivers, family SUVs, pet hair, dust, crumbs, and stained high-touch areas.
services.fullDescription: Interior detailing includes vacuuming, crevice cleaning, carpet and mat attention, seat cleaning, dashboard wipe-down, vents, cup holders, door panels, and interior glass.
features: Dashboard, console, vents, and cup holders

services.name: Full-Service Auto Detailing
services.shortDescription: The most complete package for drivers who want the inside and outside cleaned in one appointment.
services.fullDescription: A complete reset with interior deep cleaning plus exterior wash, wheels, tires, door jambs, paint-safe drying, and a crisp finishing shine.
features: Door jambs, wheels, tires, and glass
Best option before sale, trip, or seasonal reset

services.name: Exterior Detailing and Ceramic Services
services.shortDescription: Exterior cleaning, gloss enhancement, and ceramic service options for paint that needs a sharper finish.
services.fullDescription: Exterior work can include foam pre-soak, contact wash, wheels, tire dressing, bug and grime removal, glass, gloss enhancement, and ceramic service options.
